goal: semiconj_by(a, x, y) = (a * x = y * a)

p.c: function[T0: Mul](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 = x2 * x0 = semiconj_by[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[M](a, x, y)

not semiconj_by(a, x, y) or y * a = a * x

false

goal: a * x * xp = y * a * xp

p.c: function[T0: Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[S](y, a, xp)

not semiconj_by(a, x * xp, y * yp) or y * yp * a = a * (x * xp)
y * yp * a != a * (x * xp) or semiconj_by(a, x * xp, y * yp)
semiconj_by(a, x, y) and semiconj_by(a, xp, yp)
semiconj_by(a, x, y)

p.c: function[T0: Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[S](z, a, b)

goal: a * x * a.inverse * a = a * x * (a.inverse * a)

p.c: function[T0: Semigroup](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 * x2 = x0 * (x1 * x2) }[G](a * x, a.inverse, a)

goal: a * x * (a.inverse * a) = a * x * G.1

p.c: function[T0: Monoid](x0: T0) { x0 * T0.1 = x0 }[G](a * x)

goal: a * x * a.inverse * a = a * x
a * x = a * x * a.inverse * a

p.c: function[T0: Mul](x0: T0, x1: T0, x2: T0) { x0 * x1 = x2 * x0 = semiconj_by[T0](x0, x1, x2) }[G](a, x, a * x * a.inverse)
not semiconj_by(a, x, a * x * a.inverse) or a * x * a.inverse * a = a * x
a * x * a.inverse * a != a * x or semiconj_by(a, x, a * x * a.inverse)
